title: Un caballero andaluz
writer: Jesús María de Arozamena, José Luis Colina, Luis Lucia
actors: Jorge Mistral, Carmen Sevilla, Manuel Luna
plot: In the Los Laureles farmhouse, owned by don Juan Manuel Almodóvar, a wealthy Andalusian landowner, preparations are made to receive José Luis, Juan Manuel's only son, who is being educated at a Jesuit school in England and returni...
